title: catalepidia heyana
intro: Catalepidia heyana is a type of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Catalepidia heyana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Catalepidia heyana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
